message:
fix(supply_chain): refresh criteria snapshot on manual promote/demote (bd-1rsd)

refresh_manual_evaluation() previously left satisfied_criteria and
unsatisfied_criteria stale from the original evidence-based evaluation,
creating an inconsistency where the level said one thing but the criteria
said another. Now criteria are recomputed via criteria_snapshot_for_level()
so the embedded evaluation is internally self-consistent with the manually
adjusted level.

Two focused regression tests added (promotion gains criteria, demotion
loses criteria). 32 certification tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
